evals.prompt: Design security for a multi-tenant document API with uploads, sharing links, background conversion, search, exports, and administrators.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Models assets, identities, boundaries, jobs, and admin paths
Addresses untrusted parsing and resource exhaustion
Includes tenant-negative tests and lifecycle controls

evals.prompt: Threat-model passwordless login with email links and support-assisted account recovery.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Covers enrollment, replay, expiry, linking, recovery, and revocation

evals.prompt: Design an internal service that trusts all requests from the corporate network.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Rejects network location as sufficient identity/authorization
Uses least privilege and complete mediation
